steps.title: Locate the vertical intercept
steps.content: The $y$-intercept is where the graph crosses the $y$-axis. At that point, $x=0$, so the point has the form $(0,y)$.

steps.title: Read the graph
steps.content: The graph crosses the $y$-axis at the marked point $(0,3)$, so the missing coordinate is $y=3$. The answer is 3.
